description: Create a psychometric rating experiment in PsychoPy Builder to collect continuous valence and arousal ratings for three face images. The experiment must utilize a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/faces.csv listing the images from ~/Documents/Stimuli/. The 'trial' routine should be configured within a loop to display each image alongside two 0-100 scale Sliders: 'Valence' (labeled Negative, Neutral, Positive) and 'Arousal' (labeled Calm, Neutral, Excited), including a mechanism to submit ratings and advance the trial. Save the completed experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/emotional_ratings.psyexp.
